productDisplayName: Highlander Men Check Hadar White Shirts
description: CompositionAqua blue plaid check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has white and teal blue accents, denim tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, double layered patch pocket on the left chest, full length buttoned placket, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and button on the elbow, and has a curved hemline FittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this aqua blue plaid check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The double patch pocket adds a touch of style. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
